trigger_condition: COUNT(habits WHERE dominance_ratio < 0.3) == TOTAL_HABITS AND TOTAL_HABITS >= 2 AND duration_in_state >= 3 days
stage_1_visual: Single point of light in total darkness
stage_1_mechanic: Spawns 'One Thing' prompt — player picks ONE habit to attempt tomorrow
stage_2_mechanic: +50% power to first comeback attempt on chosen habit
stage_3_mechanic: Unlock 'Guided Recovery' — step-by-step rebuild of second habit
stage_4_mechanic: Adjacent habits gain passive recovery bonus
stage_5_mechanic: Permanent 'Resilience' buff — future collapses are softer
lore_tagline: Even when all fires die something refuses to go out

trigger_condition: single_habit.comeback_attempts >= 3 AND single_habit.current_streak < 2 AND last_comeback_failure <= 7 days ago
stage_1_mechanic: Tracks fall and rise count — each cycle adds permanent HP
stage_2_mechanic: Unlock 'Battle Memory' — shows what caused past failures
stage_3_mechanic: Nearby habit units gain 'Second Wind' (bonus on retry)
stage_4_mechanic: Creates 'Comeback Streak' — consecutive reclaims multiply rewards
lore_tagline: What doesn't kill you makes you stranger. And stronger.

stage_1_mechanic: Simple prompt: 'What if tomorrow?' — answering feeds growth
stage_2_mechanic: Unlock 'Curiosity Journal' — open-ended prompts no pressure
stage_3_mechanic: Growth tied to any engagement not just success
stage_4_visual: Reveals form based on player answers
stage_4_mechanic: Unit becomes unique to player — their own personal redemption archetype
lore_tagline: It started with a single question. The answer didn't matter. Asking did.

trigger_condition: active_habits >= 5 AND COUNT(habits WHERE dominance_ratio < 0.5) >= 4 AND avg_daily_completion_rate < 0.3 (last 7 days)
stage_1_mechanic: Forces 'Habit Audit' — must pause 2+ habits to continue
stage_2_mechanic: Paused habits don't spawn monsters; active ones get +30% strength
stage_3_mechanic: Unlock 'Core Three' — identify your non-negotiable habits
stage_4_mechanic: Permanently reduce max active habits but each is more powerful
lore_tagline: You don't need more soldiers. You need the right ones.

trigger_condition: journal_entries.last_3_days > 0 AND (sentiment_score < -0.6 OR keyword_match(['failure' 'worthless' 'can't' 'never' 'stupid'] count >= 3) OR self_blame_ratio > 0.4)
stage_1_mechanic: Unlocks 'Gentle Log' — track attempts without streaks/success metrics
stage_2_mechanic: Converts self-criticism into 'learning notes' — automatic reframe
stage_3_visual: Speaks your own words back with kindness
stage_3_mechanic: Creates 'Evidence File' — times you succeeded shown during doubt
stage_4_mechanic: Permanent 'Grace Period' — first miss after streak doesn't spawn monster
lore_tagline: Someone is keeping track of your courage. It might as well be you.

trigger_condition: COUNT(social_habits WHERE dominance_ratio < 0.3) == TOTAL_SOCIAL_HABITS AND TOTAL_SOCIAL_HABITS >= 1 AND days_since_friend_interaction >= 10 AND friend_checkin_response == false
stage_1_mechanic: Prompts 'Who cares?' — player identifies one person
stage_3_mechanic: Social habits gain 'Shared Strength' — friends' progress helps yours
stage_4_mechanic: Unlock 'Squad Mode' — habits can be linked with friends
lore_tagline: Even the lone wolf was part of a pack once.

trigger_condition: previous_streak >= 14 days (habit was strong) AND current_abandonment >= 5 days AND abandonment_was_abrupt AND decline_rate > 0.8
stage_1_mechanic: Mandatory 'Rest Phase' — 3 days of no habit tracking just reflection
stage_2_mechanic: Player chooses ONE habit to 'resurrect' differently (smaller sustainable)
stage_3_mechanic: Resurrected habit gets 'Wisdom Bonus' — learns from past failure
stage_4_mechanic: Unlock 'Seasonal Habits' — some habits naturally cycle and that's okay
stage_5_mechanic: Permanent 'Burnout Prevention' — early warning system for overextension
lore_tagline: Sometimes you have to burn it all down to find what was worth saving.
